summary: Replayed ADR 0288 from the merged `0.177.108 / 0.130.71` baseline using committed source `0b32e585bbf2f0445f9eddd153923f93c221dba2`, published the repo-managed Flagsmith runtime at `flags.lv3.org` behind the shared oauth2-proxy and Keycloak boundary, verified public and guest-local health from the exact-main `0.177.109` tree, and advanced the tracked platform baseline to `0.130.72`.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python -m pytest -q tests/test_flagsmith_seed.py tests/test_flagsmith_runtime_role.py tests/test_flagsmith_playbook.py tests/test_generate_platform_vars.py tests/test_hetzner_dns_record_role.py tests/test_nginx_edge_publication_role.py tests/test_subdomain_catalog.py` returned `72 passed` on the synchronized exact-main branch.
`make syntax-check-flagsmith` passed on the synchronized exact-main tree.

`scripts/release_manager.py --dry-run` confirmed current version `0.177.108`, next version `0.177.109`, and one unreleased note, and the release write prepared `0.177.109` while preserving the pre-replay platform baseline at `0.130.71`.

`ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true HETZNER_DNS_API_TOKEN=... make live-apply-service service=flagsmith env=production` succeeded from committed source `0b32e585bbf2f0445f9eddd153923f93c221dba2` with final recaps `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=171 changed=3 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=36 rescued=0 ignored=0`, `localhost : ok=23 changed=0 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=3 rescued=0 ignored=0`, `nginx-lv3 : ok=40 changed=5 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=6 rescued=0 ignored=0`, and `postgres-lv3 : ok=51 changed=0 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=21 rescued=0 ignored=0`; the public health probe retried once before settling.

`curl -fsS https://flags.lv3.org/health` returned the Flagsmith system status page, `curl -I https://flags.lv3.org/` and `curl -I https://flags.lv3.org/api/v1/projects/` both returned `HTTP/2 302` redirects into the shared oauth2-proxy sign-in flow, `docker-runtime-lv3` reported healthy `flagsmith` and `flagsmith-task-processor` containers, and a guest-local `curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8017/health` returned the same status page.

After moving to the clean exact-main candidate worktree, `uv run --with pyyaml python scripts/generate_https_tls_assurance.py --write` refreshed `config/prometheus/file_sd/https_tls_targets.yml` and `config/prometheus/rules/https_tls_alerts.yml`, and `uv run --with jsonschema --with pyyaml python scripts/generate_dependency_diagram.py --write` refreshed `docs/site-generated/architecture/dependency-graph.md`.

`git diff --check`, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate`, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards workstream-surfaces health-probes`, `make remote-validate`, and `make pre-push-gate` all passed on the clean exact-main candidate after the generated-surface refresh.

notes: This canonical exact-main receipt advances the tracked platform baseline from 0.130.71 to 0.130.72 on release 0.177.109.
The earlier branch-local receipt remains the first-live audit trail for ADR 0288 on platform version 0.130.71.

The first exact-main remote-validate attempt on the shared worktree exposed two real generated-surface drifts (`config/prometheus/file_sd/https_tls_targets.yml` and `docs/site-generated/architecture/dependency-graph.md`) and also inherited an unrelated dirty `receipts/ops-portal-snapshot.html`; the final automation replay moved to a clean candidate worktree after those surfaces were refreshed.

An earlier direct guest-local curl attempt briefly failed before the service fully settled, but the final guest-local health probe and runtime-state capture confirmed a healthy Flagsmith container plus health page on `docker-runtime-lv3`.

correction_loop.repair_action: Moved the exact-main integration onto a clean candidate worktree, refreshed the HTTPS TLS assurance targets and dependency-graph page from the merged catalog state, and reran the full automation gates before recording the canonical mainline receipt and platform-version advance.
correction_loop.verification: Replayed the committed source on the live server, verified public and guest-local Flagsmith health, reran the repository validation bundle, passed remote-validate, and passed the full pre-push gate from the clean exact-main candidate.
